name: Forex
description: The Forex market is the largest and most liquid financial market in the world, with over $7.5 trillion in daily trading volume. Binary options traders can profit from currency pair movements with CALL/PUT signals.
tradingHours: 24 hours, Monday to Friday (major sessions: London, New York, Tokyo, Sydney)
keyAdvantage: High liquidity, tight spreads, and clear trending behavior

name: OTC Markets
description: OTC (Over-The-Counter) markets offer synthetic trading instruments available 24/7, including weekends. They provide continuous trading opportunities when traditional Forex markets are closed.
keyAdvantage: Weekend trading availability and consistent patterns

name: Cryptocurrency
description: The cryptocurrency market offers binary options traders high-volatility trading opportunities on digital assets like Bitcoin, Ethereum, and other altcoins, available 24/7 with no market closures.
keyAdvantage: Extreme volatility, 24/7 availability, and strong trend movements

name: Commodities
description: Commodities trading in binary options covers precious metals (Gold, Silver), energy products (Oil, Natural Gas), and agricultural products. Gold especially is a popular safe-haven trading asset.
tradingHours: Varies by commodity, typically aligned with major market sessions
keyAdvantage: Safe-haven assets, inflation hedges, and event-driven volatility

name: Stocks & Indices
description: Stock and index binary options allow traders to speculate on the direction of individual company shares and major indices like NASDAQ 100, S&P 500, and FTSE 100 without owning the underlying assets.
tradingHours: Aligned with respective stock exchange hours (NYSE, NASDAQ, LSE)
keyAdvantage: Earnings-driven moves, sector trends, and index diversification
